chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. M.A.No. 68 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on CMA 3873/2024. 2. For orders on CMA 868/2025. 3. For orders on CMA 3874/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 04.11.2025. None have appeared in this matter since 08.05.2025. Today also no one is in attendance. No intimation is received. It seems that the appellants have lost their interest in pursuing this appeal which is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE Tufail
